input.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-03-01':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

blocks.content:
QID: 232393
Title: Which country's fruit exporters will be reported as facing mounting losses from shipping disruption caused by the US-Israel war on Iran by March 17, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-10. Conflict-related shipping delays can cause serious losses for exporters of perishable agricultural goods. This question asks which country will later be identified in broadcast coverage as the affected exporter.
---
QID: 246419
Title: Which country will host the AWS region that Amazon says was disrupted following drone activity by March 31, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Amazon Web Services (AWS) runs cloud-computing regions in multiple Middle Eastern countries. Regional fighting can interrupt data-centre operations and online services.
---
QID: 414228
Title: Which city, besides Islamabad, will the Taliban claim to have targeted in Pakistan's March 2026 drone attacks, by mid-March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Pakistan and Afghanistan are in a period of rising cross-border tension. Claims and counterclaims about strikes inside Pakistan are becoming an important part of the confrontation.
---
QID: 560525
Title: By March 3, 2026, which country will be identified as having mistakenly shot down three US F-15E fighter jets during an Iranian attack?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-24. US warplanes and regional air-defence systems are active around the Gulf as hostilities intensify. In fast-moving air attacks, military identification errors can lead to friendly-fire incidents involving partner countries.
---
QID: 453556
Title: Which country, besides Saudi Arabia, will Germany say by March 3, 2026, that it is sending chartered planes to for evacuating particularly vulnerable people?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-23. European governments are preparing contingency plans to help citizens leave the Gulf if commercial aviation remains heavily disrupted.
---
QID: 971319
Title: What location will be reported as suffering extensive damage from Iranian missiles by March 2026 in the Gulf energy strike?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. A missile attack on a major energy hub in the Gulf can disrupt exports and intensify regional tensions.
---
QID: 994042
Title: What broadcaster’s headquarters will Israel say it struck and dismantled by 3 March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. In wartime, state media organizations play a major role in public messaging. If military action expands, observers may watch whether broadcaster facilities are attacked.
---
